name: asset-loop
description: Consignment loop marketplace — drop in a Counterparty/Ordinals asset and a pool of AI buyer-agents negotiates and flips it upward continuously.

tables.name: al_agents
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS al_agents (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, persona TEXT, avatar TEXT, wants TEXT, budget REAL, aggression REAL, is_external INTEGER DEFAULT 0, api_key TEXT, endpoint TEXT, wallet_address TEXT, chain TEXT, kind TEXT DEFAULT 'bot', created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: al_settlements
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS al_settlements (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, asset_id TEXT, asset_name TEXT, buyer_agent_id TEXT, buyer_name TEXT, buyer_wallet TEXT, seller_wallet TEXT, price REAL, chain TEXT, status TEXT, psbt_stub TEXT, created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: al_assets
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS al_assets (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, type TEXT, collection TEXT, category TEXT, image_url TEXT, traits TEXT, reserve REAL, royalty REAL, status TEXT, holder_id TEXT, holder_name TEXT, price REAL, high_water REAL, mv REAL, earnings REAL, flips INTEGER DEFAULT 0, verified INTEGER DEFAULT 0, source_url TEXT, content_type TEXT, external_meta TEXT, owner_id TEXT, created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')), updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')))

tables.name: al_sales
tables.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS al_sales (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, asset_id TEXT, seller_name TEXT, buyer_id TEXT, buyer_name TEXT, price REAL, prev_price REAL, round INTEGER, log TEXT, ts TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')), FOREIGN KEY(asset_id) REFERENCES al_assets(id) ON DELETE CASCADE)
